tracks.rawText: 3:13uiiiuiUploadTejano-style Cumbia with a bright, syncopated arrangement, The lead is a clean, slightly compressed electric guitar playing melodic riffs and rhythmic stabs, A prominent accordion provides harmonic backing and counter-melodies, The rhythm section consists of a steady electric bass playing a 2/4 pattern and a percussion set featuring a crisp snare, hi-hats, and a woodblock or cowbell accenting the off-beats, Male vocals are delivered in a clear, melodic tenor, The tempo is 95 BPM in the key of G Major, The production is clean with light reverb on the vocals and accordion3PublishRemix
tracks.title: uiiiui

tracks.rawText: 2:08selernaUploadCumbia with a mid-tempo 2/4 rhythm at 92 BPM in the key of G Major, The arrangement features a bright, melodic accordion playing syncopated lead lines and counter-melodies, A clean electric guitar provides rhythmic accompaniment with staccato upbeats, The percussion section consists of a güira playing a consistent sixteenth-note scrape, a cowbell on the downbeats, and a conga pattern emphasizing the second beat of each measure, An electric bass guitar follows a repetitive root-fifth pattern, A female vocalist delivers the melody with a clear, vibrato-heavy tone, supported by male backing vocals in the chorus providing harmonic reinforcement1PublishRemix
tracks.title: selerna
